landing.hero.title: Quotes, orders, deliveries and invoices signed in seconds
landing.hero.subtitle: The complete solution for professionals: create your quotes, send them for electronic signature, and automatically convert them into purchase orders, delivery notes and invoices. Track your revenue in real time.
landing.flow.description: Automatic conversion between each step with electronic signature
landing.features.title: A complete solution for your business
landing.features.subtitle: From quote creation to payment collection, manage your entire sales cycle in one tool.
landing.features.quotesDesc: Create detailed quotes with your product catalog and send them for electronic signature.
landing.features.ordersDesc: Convert your signed quotes to purchase orders in one click.
landing.features.deliveryDesc: Automatically generate your delivery notes with customer signature on receipt.
landing.features.invoicesDesc: Transform your documents into invoices with payment tracking and Paid stamp.
landing.features.signatureDesc: Send your documents by email for remote signature or have them signed on site.
landing.features.emailDesc: Share the signature link by email, SMS or WhatsApp directly from the app.
landing.features.catalogDesc: Manage your product and service catalog with custom prices and VAT.
landing.features.dashboardDesc: Track your monthly and yearly revenue, analyze sales by client and type.
landing.features.clientsDesc: Centralize your clients with complete history and financial statistics.
landing.features.interventionsDesc: Create detailed work orders for your on-site services.
landing.features.mobileDesc: Application optimized for tablet and smartphone in the field.
landing.features.securityDesc: Your data encrypted and backed up in real time.
landing.dashboard.title: Complete financial dashboard
landing.dashboard.subtitle: Track your commercial activity and revenue in real time.
landing.pricing.title: Simple and transparent pricing
landing.pricing.subtitle: Prices shown excl. VAT - VAT
landing.pricing.applicable: applicable. 14-day free trial included for subscriptions.
landing.pricing.licenseInfo: Each license corresponds to 1 user. Select the number of licenses according to your needs.
landing.pricing.multipleLicenses: Need multiple licenses? Contact us for a custom quote.
landing.testimonials.title: They trust us
landing.testimonials.subtitle: Join hundreds of professionals who have adopted InterSign Pro.
landing.testimonials.testimonial1: InterSign Pro has revolutionized my administrative management. Electronic signature by email is a real time saver!
landing.testimonials.testimonial2: The quote-order-delivery-invoice chain is perfectly smooth. My clients are impressed.
landing.testimonials.testimonial3: The financial dashboard allows me to track my revenue in real time. Essential!
landing.cta.title: Ready to simplify your business management?
landing.cta.subtitle: Start your 14-day free trial today. Quotes, orders, deliveries and invoices in a few clicks.
